reviews.comment:
la atencion bien pero podria ser mejor,en esta oportunidad la atencion fue bien pero tuve una mala experiencia hace un par de años,un dia llegue a las 6 y monedas me atienden y me dicen buen dia, super? yo contesto buen dia no infinia pero espera que quiero ver cuanto tengo revisando el bolsillo saco $ 400 y poneme 400 en eso miro el surtidor y veo que no coincide los litros con el valor de dinero que yo pedi miró la manguera del surtidor y me estaba poniendo gasoil en lugar de infinia,que se equibocara no me molestó lo que me molesto es que tuve que esperar hasta las 8 de la mañana porque los Sres. no tenian los elementos para vaciarme el tanque,apesar de que me cambiaran la nafta y los filtros yo perdí mi dia laboral y madie se hizo cargo gracias.

(Translated by Google)
The service was okay, but it could be better. This time, the service was fine, but I had a bad experience a couple of years ago. One day I arrived around 6:00, they attended to me and said, "Good morning, Super?" I replied, "Good morning, no Infinia, but wait, I want to see how much I have." Checking my pocket, I took out $400 and said, "Put in $400." Then I looked at the pump and saw that the liters didn't match the amount of money I had asked for. I looked at the pump hose and it was putting diesel in instead of Infinia. The mistake didn't bother me; what bothered me was that I had to wait until 8:00 in the morning because they didn't have the equipment to empty my tank. Even though they changed the fuel and filters, I lost a day of work and nobody took responsibility. Thanks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpLVlEaEtBEAE

reviews.comment:
Destaco siempre lo mismo de esta estación de servicio, y vuelvo siempre por la buena atención de los playeros pero en cuanto al sistema respecto la app de YPF es malísimo en esta sucursal, muy pocas veces funciona por ende casi nunca pude aprovechar los descuentos.

(Translated by Google)
I always highlight the same thing about this gas station, and I always return because of the excellent service of the attendants, but as for the system regarding the YPF app, it is terrible at this branch; it rarely works, so I was almost never able to take advantage of the discounts.

reviews.comment:
Fila de 20 autos para cargar... Pedí agua caliente para el termo y teniendo una super cafetera de bar se negaron a darme / venderme. El muchacho del shop no entiende nada de buena onda.

(Translated by Google)
Line of 20 cars waiting to load... I asked for hot water for my thermos, and even though I have a great coffee maker from the bar, they refused to give it to me/sell it to me. The guy at the shop doesn't understand anything about good vibes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpbE5ISkVnEAE
